caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT", and a gold chain, speaks into a professional microphone. He is wearing large over-ear headphones while seated in a studio setting. Behind him is a white wall featuring logos that say "EMPOWER HUSTLE" accompanied by five stars. To his right, a screen displays the words "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics in the lower left and right corners include a logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, but his expression and hand gestures change. He starts with his hands out of view, then brings his right hand up to gesture as he speaks, and finally extends both hands forward in an open-palmed motion, emphasizing his points while continuing to look toward someone off-camera.
